questions.question: What right does Paul say he has given up for the sake of the gospel?
options: The right to financial support from the churches
questions.answer: The right to financial support from the churches

questions.question: Paul compares the Christian life to what kind of competition?
Paul says he becomes all things to all people so that by all means he might save some.
I _____ my body and make it my slave, so that after preaching to others, I myself will not be disqualified.
Do you not know that those who run in a race all run, but one receives the _____?
